timeouts._comment: Bumped from 300s/900s after DeepSeek V4 Pro hit timeouts on larger prompts. Older agents still finish well within.

_judges_comment: Cross-family LLM-judge panel. Agent under test = DeepSeek V4 Pro (single-shot), so deepseek is EXCLUDED from the panel to avoid self-preference leakage (arXiv 2502.01534). Judges = gemini + gemma4 + qwen3.5, none of them the deepseek family. A candidate passes only on majority vote; each rubric criterion is majority-voted across judges. (gemma4 and gemini share Google lineage — a minor judge-correlation caveat, but neither is the agent's family, which is what matters for agent objectivity.)

cloud.description: Uses each agent's default cloud API (Anthropic, Google)

ollama.description: Routes all agents through local Ollama for controlled comparison

_deferred_comment: Scenario E (continual coding, write-side memorize) is exercised separately — it is fragile and even SWE-Bench-CL reports continual-coding memory as empirically inconclusive. Run with: node harness/runner.js --scenario scenario-E-continual --agent claude.
